title: P1：CWA 真資料接入與 Ubuntu 主線驗證
environment: Executor: ubuntu-dev mainline worktree at /home/esgcenter0/python/Academic/trip-weather-planner using ~/venvs/python-env

context.background: Phase 1 mock scaffold is already approved. The next step is not a rebuild but a controlled transition from mock-backed forecast responses to real CWA-backed data while preserving the current no-credential demo path.
context.design: Keep the adapter-service-router contract stable. Validate real upstream behavior through the existing CWA adapter boundary. TDX remains credential-ready but functionally deferred.

in_scope: Place secrets into Ubuntu-side runtime configuration without hardcoding values into tracked files
Verify CWA adapter dataset selection for F-D0047-093 and F-D0047-091
Harden live payload parsing in backend/app/adapters/cwa.py
Preserve mock fallback when CWA_API_KEY is absent
Add or update tests for dataset selection, parsing, and error handling
Update runtime documentation for Ubuntu-side real-data verification

requirements: R1: Backend continues to run in mock mode when CWA_API_KEY is empty
R2: Backend returns normalized real forecast data when CWA_API_KEY is configured
R3: Ubuntu-side verification commands and results are documented for acceptance
acceptance_criteria: AC1: Ubuntu venv ruff check passes for backend
AC2: Ubuntu venv pytest passes for backend
AC3: Frontend npm run build still passes
AC4: With CWA_API_KEY configured, at least one real-town query returns non-mock source metadata and valid normalized forecast data
AC5: With CWA_API_KEY unset, the backend still returns deterministic mock data
AC6: No secrets are hardcoded or committed into tracked source files
AC7: Resulting Ubuntu changes are committed instead of left only in a dirty working tree

report_template.location: Ubuntu agent-bridge reports path or repo-local equivalent used by the current workflow

user_one_liner: Start Ubuntu-side coding on cathay-cloud-intern-p1-cwa-live-integration using the repo-local handoff docs and keep Mac as mirror only.
next_task_hint: After AC1-AC7 pass, the natural follow-up is Cloud Run deployment preparation for public demo readiness.
